title: Perform molecular biology tests and procedures
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform molecular biology tests and procedures demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Interpret and schedule test requirements

pcs.text: Review test request to identify samples to be tested, test method and equipment/instruments involved
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review test request to identify samples to be tested, test method and equipment/instruments involved?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review test request to identify samples to be tested, test method and equipment/instruments involved.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and workplace control measures associated with the sample, preparation methods, reagents and/or equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and workplace control measures associated with the sample, preparation methods, reagents and/or equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and workplace control measures associated with the sample, preparation methods, reagents and/or equipment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Interpret and schedule test requirements

elements.title: Receive and handle samples

pcs.text: Register samples in accordance with workplace procedures, recording details that allow accurate tracking and chain of custody traceable to employee
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Register samples in accordance with workplace procedures, recording details that allow accurate tracking and chain of custody traceable to employee?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Register samples in accordance with workplace procedures, recording details that allow accurate tracking and chain of custody traceable to employee.

pcs.text: Match sample provided to accompanying documentation and report any discrepancies in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Match sample provided to accompanying documentation and report any discrepancies in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Match sample provided to accompanying documentation and report any discrepancies in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Store samples in accordance with workplace and test method requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store samples in accordance with workplace and test method requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store samples in accordance with workplace and test method requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Receive and handle samples

elements.title: Prepare equipment and reagents

pcs.text: Set up equipment/instrumentation in accordance with workplace procedures and perform pre-use and safety checks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set up equipment/instrumentation in accordance with workplace procedures and perform pre-use and safety checks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set up equipment/instrumentation in accordance with workplace procedures and perform pre-use and safety checks.

pcs.text: Select and collect reagents in accordance with test method requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and collect reagents in accordance with test method requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and collect reagents in accordance with test method requirements.

pcs.text: Prepare and label reagents in accordance with test method requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and label reagents in accordance with test method requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and label reagents in accordance with test method requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare equipment and reagents

elements.title: Extract, verify and manipulate biomolecules

pcs.text: Produce/extract biomolecules from samples using appropriate methods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Produce/extract biomolecules from samples using appropriate methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Produce/extract biomolecules from samples using appropriate methods.

pcs.text: Prevent contamination of samples by unwanted biomolecules
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prevent contamination of samples by unwanted biomolecules?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prevent contamination of samples by unwanted biomolecules.

pcs.text: Recognise the presence of common inhibitors of biomolecular reactions and take corrective action
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise the presence of common inhibitors of biomolecular reactions and take corrective action?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise the presence of common inhibitors of biomolecular reactions and take corrective action.

pcs.text: Quantify and qualify biomolecular yields from purified extractions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Quantify and qualify biomolecular yields from purified extractions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Quantify and qualify biomolecular yields from purified extractions.

pcs.text: Use appropriate techniques to prepare and test a range of biomolecular samples
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use appropriate techniques to prepare and test a range of biomolecular samples?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use appropriate techniques to prepare and test a range of biomolecular samples.

pcs.text: Use controls and reference standards to confirm the integrity of biomolecular sample preparation and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use controls and reference standards to confirm the integrity of biomolecular sample preparation and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use controls and reference standards to confirm the integrity of biomolecular sample preparation and procedures.

pcs.text: Troubleshoot basic procedure, reagent or equipment problems which have led to atypical data or results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Troubleshoot basic procedure, reagent or equipment problems which have led to atypical data or results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Troubleshoot basic procedure, reagent or equipment problems which have led to atypical data or results.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Extract, verify and manipulate biomolecules

elements.title: Report and communicate results

pcs.text: Record and/or check data in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and/or check data in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and/or check data in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Follow procedures to ensure traceability of sample from receipt to reporting of results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow procedures to ensure traceability of sample from receipt to reporting of results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow procedures to ensure traceability of sample from receipt to reporting of results.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Report and communicate results
